rooms.label: Kitchen
rooms.constraints: NKBA: island + work triangle + dining. 48in around island. Typical 15×18ft

rooms.label: Primary Bed
rooms.constraints: King 76×80 + 24in clearance + walk-in closet access. Typical 12×16ft

rooms.label: Guest/Flex
rooms.constraints: IRC R304: ≥70sf (64 grid-relaxed). Queen 60×80 + 24in clearance 3 sides

rooms.label: Full Bath
rooms.constraints: NKBA: tub/shower + toilet + vanity. 30in clearance to opposite wall

rooms.label: Half Bath
rooms.constraints: Powder room: toilet + pedestal sink. IRC min 30×30in shower n/a
